title: Mega Gallade Battle Guide
summary: A fast 165 Attack [psychic]/[fighting] physical attacker — [close-combat] as the main STAB with [zen-headbutt] and [knock-off] for coverage.
strengths: 165 Attack is among the highest on Mega forms

recommendedItems.reason: Mandatory Mega Stone with no alternative

bodyMarkdown:
## Overview
Mega Gallade is a fast physical [psychic]/[fighting] attacker with 165 base Attack and 110 Speed. Unlike its special-oriented sister Mega Gardevoir, Gallade leans into raw physical damage with [close-combat] as the primary STAB and [zen-headbutt] for [psychic] coverage.

## Strengths
165 Attack is one of the highest on any Mega, and [close-combat] STAB is brutal against Steel, Normal, Dark, and Ice targets. Speed 110 outruns a large portion of natural-Speed threats, and the [psychic]/[fighting] combination covers most resistances with just two moves. [knock-off] punishes switch-ins by removing items.

## Weaknesses & Answers
Ghost, Flying, and [fairy] are all common meta types, and both [close-combat] and [zen-headbutt] are resisted by Ghost. Physical bulk 68/95 is mediocre, so predicting switches matters. [inner-focus] only prevents flinch — minimal utility in practice.

## Recommended Moveset
[close-combat] is the main damage move. [zen-headbutt] is the [psychic] STAB for Poison/[fighting] targets. [knock-off] covers Ghost types and cripples item users. [protect] secures the Mega turn.

## Item · Ability · Tera
[galladite] is mandatory. [inner-focus] activates after Mega. Tera [fighting] stacks STAB on [close-combat], while Tera [fairy] creates a resistant typing that flips Ghost and Dark defensively.

## Teammates & Synergy
Dark and Ghost partners cover the Ghost weakness. Steel or Poison partners handle [fairy] counters. intimidate and tailwind support extend Mega Gallade's effective window.

## Play Patterns
Protect on Mega, then spam [close-combat] into physical targets. Swap to [zen-headbutt] against Poison walls. Use [knock-off] on switch-ins to strip items. Switch out on Ghost or [fairy] types — they completely wall the set.
